fields.title: Introduction to Machine Learning
fields.body: Machine learning is a subfield of artificial intelligence. Machine learning algorithms build models from data. Supervised machine learning uses labeled examples to train models. Unsupervised machine learning discovers hidden patterns without labels. Machine learning has transformed search and recommendation systems.

fields.title: Modern Search Systems
fields.body: Modern search systems combine multiple ranking signals to estimate document relevance. Techniques from machine learning are increasingly used alongside traditional lexical scoring methods like BM25 to improve result quality.

fields.title: Comprehensive Survey of Machine Learning
fields.body: Machine learning encompasses a broad range of techniques for building predictive models from data. The field of machine learning draws from statistics, optimization theory, and computer science. Early machine learning research focused on perceptrons and decision trees. Modern machine learning includes deep neural networks, gradient boosting, and transformer architectures. Machine learning applications span natural language processing, computer vision, robotics, drug discovery, climate modeling, autonomous vehicles, fraud detection, speech recognition, medical imaging, financial forecasting, supply chain optimization, and many other domains. Evaluation of machine learning models requires careful cross-validation and statistical testing to avoid overfitting and ensure generalization to unseen data.

fields.title: Machine Learning Basics
fields.body: Machine learning builds models from data. Machine learning is essential for modern search.

fields.title: Database Indexing
fields.body: B-tree indexes provide efficient lookup for range queries in relational databases. Hash indexes offer constant-time point lookups but do not support range scans.

fields.title: Industrial Machines
fields.body: Modern industrial machines use sensors and actuators to automate manufacturing processes. These machines require regular maintenance and calibration to operate within tolerance.

fields.title: Deep Neural Networks
fields.body: Deep learning and neural networks have achieved remarkable results in computer vision and natural language understanding. Training large models requires significant computational resources and careful hyperparameter tuning.

fields.title: AI in Enterprise Search
fields.body: Enterprise search platforms integrate machine learning for query understanding and result ranking. They combine lexical scoring with vector embeddings, knowledge graphs, and business rules to deliver relevant results across heterogeneous data sources.
